name: Centuria Capital Group
analysis: CNI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.1400. Trade idea: entry A$2.1800, stop A$1.9107, target A$2.9879 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
